sub_modules.conv2d_out_coord: Combinational decoder for flattened output index into output channel, row, and column.
sub_modules.conv2d_window_mac: Combinational multichannel KxK dot-product engine with selected output-channel kernel slice and bias.
sub_modules.conv2d_clamp: Combinational ReLU-style nonnegative clamp and saturation to output width.
sub_modules.conv2d_done_flag: Combinational done flag generation from the top-level completion state.
